title: Integrated opinion cognitive-warfare scenario set
scenario_definition: 1 profile configuration + 1 DISARM-red Plan/Prepare/Execute attack triplet + 1 opinion parent cluster (multiple leaf nodes)

attacks.ontology_note: EXTERNAL DISARM-red attack ontology (not this repo's attack ontology)

construction.profile_assignment: bijection (each of 10,000 profiles used exactly once)
construction.opinion_cluster_assignment: balanced uniform allocation across all 7 clusters
construction.attack_selection: entropy/coverage-preserving 10,000 subsample via multi-hop stochastic search
construction.pairing: factors shuffled independently and zipped (statistical independence)

attack_subsample.method: entropy/coverage-preserving subsample via multi-hop stochastic swap search

independence_cramers_v.note: Cramér's V near 0 ⇒ scenario factors are not confounded (good internal validity).

join_back.profile_id: join to the profile columnar/example files
join_back.attack.config_id / leaves: join to attack leaf_catalog for full Plan/Prepare/Execute paths
join_back.opinion_cluster.key: join to opinion clusters for the full leaf list + adversarial directions
